productDisplayName: Scullers For Her Women Printed Black Top
description: Composition Black and white printed top made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with a slit neckline, full front buttoned placket, short sleeves that are elasticated at the cuffs, slightly ruched on either side of the placket and a curved hem Fit Slim Wash care Hand or machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations A feminine top with a casual twist, this black and white printed top from scullers for her is a must-have in your wardrobe if you want to look pretty and focused at the same time. The ruched look and elasticated sleeves make it a perfect choice for a casual look. Pair it with jeans and ballerinas for a great ensemble. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
